rulings.Case Title: EST. OF DOROTHY DONALDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The examiner is unable to complete the review because this petition is missing information; not all sections have been filled out. Additionally, other required documents, such as the notice, proposed order, and duties and liabilities, are not on file. The Court will decide whether this petition should be dismissed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before that status hearing date, no appearance will be required on that date.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHISUM FAMILY TRUST DATED MARCH 1, 2001 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instruction Re: Confirming Trustee Of Trust And Request To Ratify Actions Of Maura Albrecht As Attorney-In-Fact
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/27/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) A petition involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries (CRC 7.902). 2) The instant petition contains no allegation of venue. Petitioner lives in Minnesota and the objector has filed a related proceeding in San Mateo County. In a verified supplement to the petition, please clarify why venue in San Francisco is proper (Probate Code 17005). 3) All notices must include language about remote appearances (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6). 4) No proposed order has been received or reviewed by the court. Any party lodging a proposed order in a contested matter must file proof of service of the proposed order on all parties entitled to notice of the petition. (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A.4). Please address the above issues and provide courtesy copies of all further filings and a proposed order to this examiner no later than 01/13/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE REARDON FAMILY TRUST AGREEMENT, DATED OCTOBER 11, 2020 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Assets As Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This matter will be heard in Room 220 by a visiting judge. Meeting ID reposted: https://sftc-org.zoomgov.com/j/1606645741?pwd=LzNJVUdNaDNTc3JJQStueDI2UGhhQT09 Webinar ID: 161 4867 3008 Webinar Passcode: 3084557 The following issues need to be cleared/addressed: 1. The examiner cannot complete the review because even-numbered pages of the exhibits are missing. 2. Notice of Hearing is not on file, despite the petition on page 5 indicating it would be served. Prob. Code 851. 3. Notice of Directions for Remote appearance and Access must be given to the decedent's father/heir. LRSF 14.1.C. 4. Clarification is needed on when each asset, except for the Saddle Creek property, was acquired, specifically whether they were obtained before or after the trust was established. 5. Need information whether any other assets were titled in the Trust, aside from those subject to this petition. If so, it seems that the deceased intended to keep them titled in his individual name. The Court may inquire further. 6. The case caption needs correction regarding the year of the trust.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MIMI WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate will be set for 6/15/27. The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before 6/15/27. Appearance will be required on that status date if no petition has been filed. No SASE was provided; copies of signed orders cannot be returned to Counsel.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAO J. PILLARISETTY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/13/2026. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) If a citizen of a foreign country dies without leaving a will or if it appears that property will pass to a citizen of a foreign country, notice shall be given to a recognized diplmatic or consular official of the foreign country maintaining an office in the United States (Probate Code Section 8113). 2) Item 8 requires the age to be listed for all persons listed in Item 8. In a verified supplement, please clarify whether all the heirs are adults. 3) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A). Please address the above issues and delivery courtesy copies of all further filings and a proposed order to this examiner no later than January 5, 2026, to avoid additional continuance.
